text: also multiple labels should be given comman-separated, since they are also listed that way

Clear spec: -l adds label(s), -L replaces all labels, -x removes label(s). Comma-separated input aligns with display format. Bumped to p2 since accidentally replacing all labels when adding one is a footgun. Backward-compat note: current -l users expect replace, so this is a breaking change — acceptable pre-1.0.
